name: Oatmeal Lace Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer with a paddle, combine the dry ingredients: flour and baking soda.
2. In a separate bowl, stir together the wet ingredients: sugar, oats, cream, corn syrup, melted butter, and vanilla extract until well blended.
3. Gently fold the wet mixture into the dry mixture using a spatula or wooden spoon.
4. Scoop spoonfuls of batter onto nonstick sheet pans, spacing them far apart.
5. Bake at 350°F for the recommended time, as indicated in your baking instructions.
